🇦🇷 ARGENTINA WATCH PARTY 🇦🇷
Join us at Bodega on June 17th at 7PM as we watch Argentina vs Algeria!
Drink specials all night. Come early to get a seat!
📍 Bodega Bar & Kitchen, 1221 Main St, Houston TX
#Argentina #WorldCup2026 #WatchParty #Vamos

World Cup Watch Party - USA vs Paraguay
Date: June 12, 2026
Time: 9:00 PM EST
Venue: The Dubliner Irish Pub, 520 N Capitol St NW, Washington DC 20001
Free entry. Full menu available. Multiple screens.
Bring your friends and your flags!

Brazil vs Morocco World Cup Watch Party
Organized by: Rio Social Club NYC
Date and time: Saturday, June 13, 2026 at 9:00 PM EDT
Location: Copacabana Restaurant, 50 W 34th St, New York NY 10001
Tickets: Free, registration required
Join us for the biggest Brazilian watch party in New York! Live DJ, caipirinha specials, and Brazilian street food.
Vamos la Roja 🇪🇸❤️ watching Spain tonight at our place. Same spot as always, doors open at 6. See you there 🍺

🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿 ENGLAND SUPPORTERS CLUB - OFFICIAL WATCH PARTY 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿
England vs Croatia | Group Stage | June 17 2026
Kickoff: 8PM ET
Where: The Cock & Bull British Pub, 9000 Sunset Blvd, West Hollywood CA 90069
Official England Supporters Club event. Replica shirts encouraged. Sing your heart out!

Come watch the game with us this Sunday! 🍻 Big screens, cold beers, great people. We'll be showing the World Cup match starting at 3pm. No cover charge.
📍 The Tap Room, Miami FL
#WorldCup #WatchParty #Miami #Soccer

🇩🇪 Deutschland Stammtisch - WM 2026 🇩🇪
Wir schauen Deutschland gegen Curaçao am 14. Juni um 13 Uhr!
Ort: Zum Schneider, 107 Avenue C, New York NY 10009
Kommt alle! Bier und Bratwurst für alle! 🍺🥨
#DFB #WM2026 #Deutschland #Stammtisch

OFFICIAL FIFA FAN FEST - DOWNTOWN LOS ANGELES
Dates: June 11 - July 19, 2026
Location: Grand Park, 200 N Grand Ave, Los Angeles CA 90012
Free admission. Giant screens, food trucks, live entertainment, interactive zones.
Powered by the City of LA and FIFA. Open to all fans.
Watching the match tonight 👀⚽ come through if you're around. You know where we are 😏 #WorldCup2026

France vs Senegal World Cup 2026 Watch Party
Hosted by: Alliance Française de Chicago
Date: Monday June 16 2026
Time: 7:00 PM CDT
Location: The Mid, 306 N Halsted St, Chicago IL 60661
Tickets: $10 general admission, includes one complimentary drink
Join the French community of Chicago for this historic Group Stage clash. French and Senegalese fans both welcome!

🇲🇽🇲🇽🇲🇽 MEXICO VS SOUTH AFRICA 🇲🇽🇲🇽🇲🇽
Arranque del Mundial 2026!
Fecha: 11 de Junio, 2026
Hora: 2PM
Lugar: La Cantina Mexicana, 4850 W Fullerton Ave, Chicago IL 60639
Entrada libre. Habrá botanas, margaritas y mucha pasión mexicana. ¡Arriba México!
#VivaLaSelección #Mexico #WorldCup2026 #FIFAWorldCup

Netherlands fans assemble! 🇳🇱🧡 Watching Oranje vs Japan on June 14th at our usual spot. Starts at 8PM sharp. BYOB welcome. Drop a 🧡 if you're coming!
